creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: FWIW, Xorg since ports 4b9c697c260c (UDEV only supports evdev) and Sway before ports 78457167564c open a new VT unused by getty(8) to dump garbage to. libseat probably follows Xorg -sharevts behavior to support multiseat with -Dlibseat-logind but -Dlibseat-seatd (used on FreeBSD) doesn't support multiseat yet per https://lists.sr.ht/~kennylevinsen/seatd-devel/%3C5838998b-326f-1e0b-29a1-57ac09d137c6%40beroal.in.ua%3E
